description_long: This is a medium-sized detached house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are a light beige color, and the house sits on a raised foundation with a set of steps leading up to a covered front porch. The front facade features a prominent central dormer with a large window, flanked by smaller windows on either side. The house has multiple windows on all sides, arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the roof includes a secondary gable over the porch area. The structure is surrounded by a neatly trimmed green lawn, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood setting.
description: A beige, gable-roofed house with a raised front porch, central dormer, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, covered porch, central dormer, and symmetrical window layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side windows, the depth of the porch, and the roof's overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with fewer windows and the full expanse of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional windows and the side profile of the porch and roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front steps leading to a covered porch with a gabled overhang and a single main door.
